description: A clean agency statistics card on a deep navy-blue subtly textured (wood-grain-like) background, matching ICE's daily 'Enforcement Update' template series. In the upper-left is the round white U.S. Department of Homeland Security seal (eagle with shield) beside three lines of white serif text reading 'U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement'. A thin dark-red horizontal rule runs full-width beneath the header. Centered below in large bold white serif type is the headline 'Enforcement Update' with a smaller serif subheading 'January 25, 2025'. The statistics are stacked and centered in large white serif numerals: '286 Arrests' and '421 Detainers Lodged'. At the bottom, centered in italic white serif, is the caption 'ICE single-day statistics'. The design is restrained, official and template-based (no photos or illustration). Messaging technique: it broadcasts single-day enforcement metrics to project momentum and effectiveness of the immigration crackdown, using authoritative government branding and prominent numerals to signal aggressive, ongoing action. Target audience: the public and media, demonstrating the administration delivering on immigration-enforcement promises.
notable_text: U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement | Enforcement Update | January 25, 2025 | 286 Arrests | 421 Detainers Lodged | ICE single-day statistics
